CGC-20-582550. THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING, AND RULES AS FOLLOWS: BASED ON THE REPRESENTATION OF COUNSEL FOR OLD REPUBLIC GENERAL INSURANCE CORPORATION THAT THEY INTEND TO DISMISS CASE NO. CGC-20-586192 BY THE END OF THIS WEEK, THE COURT ORDERS THIS MATTER OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. ANY REQUEST BY THE PARTIES TO CHANGE THE EXISTING TRIAL DATES MUST BE MADE AS A SEPARATE REQUEST TO THE PRESIDING JUDGE. JUDGE: ETHAN P. MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-15-2021 IN 206, DEFENDANTS OLEG TSOKOLAYEV AND CENTRAL CONCRETE SUPPLY CO., INC.'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY JOSEPH APPEL, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFFS; VINCENT CASTILLO, ESQ. & ALEXEI OFFILL-KLEIN, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFFS FAILED TO LODGE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR OPPOSITION PAPERS PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THEREFORE THE COURT DID NOT CONSIDER THE OPPOSITION. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 04/26/21 IS CONTINUED TO 07/06/21 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. DISCOVERY CLOSED PURSUANT TO THE TRIAL DATE OF 04/26/21. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MOVING PARTY TO SERVE ORDER. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)

Matter argued and submitted. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and rules as follows: Based on the representation of counsel for Old Republic General Insurance Corporation that they intend to dismiss case no. CGC-20-586192 by the end of this week, the Court orders this matter off calendar as moot. Any request by the parties to change the existing trial dates must be made as a separate request to the Presiding Judge.
